summary: Ship AI that stays on-brand Discussion | Link
content: Brandfetch is the brand identity platform. Search any brand's official logos, colors, fonts, and company details, or use our API to power modern product experiences and AI agents. One platform, 50M+ brands, one lookup away. Trusted by teams at Canva, Typeform, and Pitch. Learn more at brandfetch.com.
chineseSummary: 发布保留在品牌上的人工智能 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Brandfetch 是品牌识别平台。搜索任何品牌的官方徽标、颜色、字体和公司详细信息，或使用我们的 API 来支持现代产品体验和人工智能代理。一个平台，5000万+品牌，一键查找。受到 Canva、Typeform 和 Pitch 团队的信任。请访问brandfetch.com 了解更多信息。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
